warning: Execution of any tool in this list requires explicit confirmation and pre-execution scope review.

tools.mutation_scope: file_relocation — moves modules from STAGING/APPLICATION_FUNCTIONS/ to Blueprints reasoning/utils directories
tools.safety_notes: Always run with dry-run first. Confirm SOURCE_DIR and DEST dirs. Only staging modules are targeted — do not point at runtime dirs.

tools.mutation_scope: source_file_rewrite — rewrites import statements in-place in any .py file targeted by the rewrite table
tools.safety_notes: Fail-closed by design. Run --dry-run and verify ALL diffs before --live pass. Only AUTO_REPAIRABLE violations are touched. Preconditions must pass or tool aborts.

tools.mutation_scope: file_relocation — moves modules between categorical subdirectories under _Dev_Resources/STAGING/APPLICATION_FUNCTIONS/
tools.safety_notes: Move-only, no code modifications. Verify module_packets.json categorization is correct before running. Target directories must exist.
